detail: CD run 27637922051 deploy-apps queued on self-hosted/wordgame-spoke with runner_id 0 and no registered repo runners.
Added Terraform precondition in mcaps-infra/runner.tf requiring github_runner_token when enable_self_hosted_runner is true.
Added runner-readiness job in .github/workflows/cd.yml and made deploy-apps depend on readiness success.
terraform -chdir=mcaps-infra validate succeeded; workflow YAML rendered with gh workflow view.
scripts/verify-local.sh failed in apps/web lint due missing ESLint config in current baseline environment.
CI infra fmt check failed; applied terraform fmt -recursive in mcaps-infra and revalidated successfully.
